---
title: "Final Project (MSC)"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Final Project: University Dropout

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(skimr)
library(GGally)
library(broom)
library(corrplot)


df <- read.csv("dropout_data.csv", sep = ";")

df <- clean_names(df)

cat_vars <- c(
  "marital_status",
  "application_mode",
  "course",
  "daytime_evening_attendance",
  "previous_qualification",
  "nacionality",
  "mother_s_qualification",
  "father_s_qualification",
  "mother_s_occupation",
  "father_s_occupation",
  "displaced",
  "educational_special_needs",
  "debtor",
  "tuition_fees_up_to_date",
  "gender",
  "scholarship_holder",
  "international"
)

num_vars <- c(
  "application_order",
  "previous_qualification_grade",
  "admission_grade",
  "age_at_enrollment",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_credited",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_enrolled",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_evaluations",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_approved",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_grade",
  "curricular_units_1st_sem_without_evaluations",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_credited",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_enrolled",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_evaluations",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_approved",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_grade",
  "curricular_units_2nd_sem_without_evaluations",
  "unemployment_rate",
  "inflation_rate",
  "gdp"
)

outcome_colors <- c(
  "Dropout" = "#D55E00",
  "Enrolled" = "#0072B2",
  "Graduate" = "#009E73"
)

theme_report <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


theme_set(theme_report)
```

Preprocesement of the data, check for missing values.

```{r}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(cat_vars), as.factor),
    target = factor(target, levels = c("Dropout", "Enrolled", "Graduate")),
    dropout_bin = if_else(target == "Dropout", 0, 1),
    dropout_bin_f = factor(dropout_bin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Dropout", "No dropout"))
  )

dim(df)
names(df)
glimpse(df)
skim(df)

colSums(is.na(df))
sum(is.na(df))
```

Analysis of the distribution of the dataset:

```{r}

table(df$dropout_bin_f)
prop.table(table(df$dropout_bin_f))

table(df$target)
prop.table(table(df$target))

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, fill = target)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of academic outcomes",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = dropout_bin_f, fill = dropout_bin_f)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Dropout" = "#D55E00", "No dropout" = "#0072B2")) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of binary dropout outcome",
    x = "Binary outcome",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

```{r}

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(marital_status))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of marital status",
    x = "Marital status",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(marital_status), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by marital status",
    x = "Marital status",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(application_mode))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of application mode",
    x = "Application mode",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(application_mode), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by application mode",
    x = "Application mode",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = application_order)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of application order",
    x = "Application order",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(application_order), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by application order",
    x = "Application order",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(course))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of courses",
    x = "Course",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(course), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by course",
    x = "Course",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(daytime_evening_attendance))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of daytime vs evening attendance",
    x = "Attendance type",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(daytime_evening_attendance), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by attendance type",
    x = "Attendance type",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(previous_qualification))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of previous qualification",
    x = "Previous qualification",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(previous_qualification), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by previous qualification",
    x = "Previous qualification",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = previous_qualification_grade)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of previous qualification grade",
    x = "Grade",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = previous_qualification_grade, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Previous qualification grade by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Grade"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(nacionality))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of nationality",
    x = "Nationality",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(nacionality), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by nationality",
    x = "Nationality",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(mother_s_qualification))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of mother's qualification",
    x = "Mother's qualification",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(mother_s_qualification), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by mother's qualification",
    x = "Mother's qualification",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(father_s_qualification))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of father's qualification",
    x = "Father's qualification",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(father_s_qualification), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by father's qualification",
    x = "Father's qualification",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(mother_s_occupation))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of mother's occupation",
    x = "Mother's occupation",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(mother_s_occupation), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by mother's occupation",
    x = "Mother's occupation",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(father_s_occupation))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of father's occupation",
    x = "Father's occupation",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(father_s_occupation), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by father's occupation",
    x = "Father's occupation",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

ggplot(df, aes(x = admission_grade)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of admission grade",
    x = "Admission grade",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = admission_grade, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Admission grade by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Admission grade"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(displaced), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by displaced status",
    x = "Displaced",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(educational_special_needs))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of educational special needs",
    x = "Special needs",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(educational_special_needs), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by educational special needs",
    x = "Special needs",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(debtor))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of students with debt",
    x = "Debtor",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(debtor), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by debtor status",
    x = "Debtor",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(tuition_fees_up_to_date))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of tuition payment status",
    x = "Tuition fees up to date",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(tuition_fees_up_to_date), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by tuition payment status",
    x = "Tuition status",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(gender))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of gender",
    x = "Gender",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(gender), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by gender",
    x = "Gender",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(scholarship_holder))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of scholarship holders",
    x = "Scholarship holder",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = age_at_enrollment)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of age at enrollment",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = age_at_enrollment, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Age at enrollment by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Age"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(international))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#0072B2") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of international students",
    x = "International",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(international), fill = target)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Academic outcome by international status",
    x = "International",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_credited)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Credited units in first semester",
    x = "Credited units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_1st_sem_credited, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Credited units by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Credited units"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_enrolled)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Enrolled curricular units (1st semester)",
    x = "Enrolled units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_1st_sem_enrolled, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Enrolled units by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Enrolled units"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_evaluations)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Evaluations in first semester",
    x = "Evaluations",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_1st_sem_evaluations, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Evaluations by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Evaluations"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_approved)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Approved curricular units in first semester",
    x = "Approved units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_approved)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Approved curricular units in first semester",
    x = "Approved units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_grade)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of first semester grades",
    x = "Average grade",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_grade)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of first semester grades",
    x = "Average grade",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_1st_sem_without_evaluations)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "First semester units without evaluation",
    x = "Units without evaluation",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_1st_sem_without_evaluations, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Units without evaluation by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Units without evaluation"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_credited)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Credited curricular units in second semester",
    x = "Credited units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_2nd_sem_credited, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Credited units in second semester by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Credited units"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_enrolled)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Enrolled curricular units in second semester",
    x = "Enrolled units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_2nd_sem_enrolled, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Enrolled units in second semester by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Enrolled units"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_evaluations)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Second semester evaluations",
    x = "Evaluations",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_evaluations)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Second semester evaluations",
    x = "Evaluations",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_approved)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Approved curricular units in second semester",
    x = "Approved units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_approved)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Approved curricular units in second semester",
    x = "Approved units",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_grade)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of second semester grades",
    x = "Average grade",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_2nd_sem_grade, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Second semester grades by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Average grade"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = curricular_units_2nd_sem_without_evaluations)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Second semester units without evaluation",
    x = "Units without evaluation",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = curricular_units_2nd_sem_without_evaluations, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Units without evaluation by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Units without evaluation"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = unemployment_rate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of unemployment rate",
    x = "Unemployment rate",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = unemployment_rate, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Unemployment rate by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Unemployment rate"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = inflation_rate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of inflation rate",
    x = "Inflation rate",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = inflation_rate, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Inflation rate by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "Inflation rate"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = gdp)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#0072B2", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of GDP",
    x = "GDP",
    y = "Count"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = target, y = gdp, fill = target)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "GDP by academic outcome",
    x = "Outcome",
    y = "GDP"
  )
```

```{r}

num_summary <- df %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(num_vars),
      list(
        mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        min = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        p25 = ~quantile(.x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
        median = ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        p75 = ~quantile(.x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
        max = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)"
  )

num_summary

cat_summary <- df %>%
  select(all_of(cat_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  count(variable, value) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(variable, desc(n))

cat_summary
```

LINEAR RELATION STUDIES:

```{r}

# Vriables numericas:

cor_matrix <- df %>%
  select(all_of(num_vars)) %>%
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

short_names <- c(
  "App order", "Prev qual grade", "Admission grade", "Age",
  "1st cred", "1st enrolled", "1st eval", "1st approved", "1st grade", "1st no eval",
  "2nd cred", "2nd enrolled", "2nd eval", "2nd approved", "2nd grade", "2nd no eval",
  "Unemployment", "Inflation", "GDP"
)

colnames(cor_matrix) <- short_names
rownames(cor_matrix) <- short_names

corrplot(
  cor_matrix,
  method = "color",
  type = "upper",
  order = "hclust",
  tl.cex = 0.8,
  tl.col = "black",
  number.cex = 0.5
)

# Variables categoricas:

GGally::ggbivariate(
  df %>% select(target, all_of(cat_vars)),
  outcome = "target",
  cardinality_threshold = 50
)
```
